• Web-based MIDI player that syncs audio samples to MIDI sequences
  • Features customizable playback speed, pitch shifting, and real-time audio visualization
  • Supports both library presets and custom file uploads for audio and MIDI
  • Generates shareable URLs with current configuration for easy sharing
  • Exports rendered audio as WAV files using offline rendering
    const sampler = new Tone.Sampler({urls: {C4: url}}).toDestination();
    player = new MidiPlayer.Player((event) => { sampler.triggerAttackRelease(shiftedNote, "8n"); });

MIDIbeat is an interactive web application that plays MIDI sequences with custom audio samples. Users can select from a library of sounds and sequences, upload their own files, adjust playback parameters, visualize the audio waveform in real-time, and export their creations as downloadable WAV files. The app features URL-based sharing and offline rendering capabilities for high-quality audio exports.
